title: Bswaldrop
compiled_truth: Bswaldrop is an external contact at [AOL](companies/aol). Over the corpus period (2001-02-23 to 2001-11-13), Bswaldrop sent 45 and received 71 emails, totalling 116 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (39), [Suzanne M Bennett](people/suzanne-m-bennett-dynegy) (5), [Tgoodnight](people/tgoodnight-amfm) (3), [Cpburkhart](people/cpburkhart-yahoo) (3), [Twaldrop](people/twaldrop-robinsonwaldrop) (2).
